Company: Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd.
UEN: 202312345Z

Investors: 
- Mr. Tan Wei Ming
- Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah

Amount: SGD 5,000,000

Pre-Money Valuation: SGD 20,000,000

NRIC of Lead Investor: S2345678B

Signatories:
- Mr. Tan Wei Ming, Lead Investor
- Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, Co-Investor

This term sheet is intended to outline the proposed terms and conditions for the Series B funding round for Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. and does not constitute a legally binding commitment.
